refnamediv.refpurpose: Convert gradient magnitude into an edge-aware weight map.

listitem.para: Input image used to compute gradient magnitude.
Positive edge sensitivity. Larger values reduce weights more strongly near edges. Default is 1.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns weights in the range 0 to 1. Smooth regions receive weights near one, while strong image edges receive lower weights.

refsection.title: Examples
